name: clockodo
description: Reads Clockodo customers, projects, services, users, time entries, absences, teams, surcharges, lump-sum services, nonbusiness groups/days, holiday/overtime carryovers, target hours, and current-user settings, and writes customers/projects/services/teams/lump-sum services through the Clockodo REST API.

risk.read: external Clockodo API read of customer, project, service, user, time-entry, absence, and workspace-configuration data
risk.write: external mutation; creates/updates/deletes live Clockodo customers, projects, services, teams, and lump-sum services
risk.approval: required for all write actions; reads remain none
